svg.text: Four-Layer Governance Architecture for AI Training Data Pipelines
📊 Quality Pass Rate · Toxicity Flag Rate
🏛️ GOVERNANCE SPINE — Audit, Policy & Compliance Layer
EU AI Act · NIST AI RMF
Gap 1: Downstream Dominance → Addressed by entire upstream-first architecture (Layers 1–4)
Gap 2: Documentation Without Control → Layer 1 ingestion gates + Layer 3 change-control process
Gap 3: Weak Provenance & Rights → Layer 1 C2PA credentials + License ML + Provenance Ledger
Gap 4: Inadequate Multimodal Metrics → Layer 2 CMDI (novel contribution)
Gap 5: Missing Decision-Support → Governance Spine decision-support model
Gap 6: Limited Enterprise Implementation → Full 4-layer repeatable operating capability
RDI Framework v0.1 — Draft Working Paper, March 2026 — Not for Circulation
